Title: Digimon Adventure 02: The Beginning
Actors: Fukujurou Katayama, Junko Noda, Arthur Lounsbery
Plot: Daisuke, Miyako, Iori, Takeru Takashi, Hikari, and Ken must reconcile new responsibilities with their Digimon partners. But Rui Owada, a mysterious young man, appears claiming to be the first human to partner with a Digimon.
